title: Henbrandt 2 x Glitter Unicorn Poo Pink Putty Tub of Slime Squishy Stretchy Poo Toys Stress Relief Toy for Kids Putty Unicorn Party Bag Favours Loot Bag Fillers Lucky Dip Favours Stocking Fillers
features: Pack of 2 tubs of Glitter Unicorn Poop Putty for kids.
These tubs of sticky, stretchy putty slime are ideal party favours, loot bag fillers, school rewards, classroom gifts, stocking fillers and lucky dip prizes.
The “unicorn poo” slime is designed to create a satisfying tactile experience, and they are ideal for people with anxiety or sensory fidget toys for those with autism and ADHD.
Not suitable for children aged 3 and under.
description: Product description These mini tubs of squishy pink Unicorn Poo slime putty with added glitter make fantastic party favours for kids, loot bag fillers, stocking fillers, classroom prizes, or pocket money toys. The unicorn poo putty is also an ideal sensory toy for children and adults alike. The glitter slime makes a great stress toy and can help with anxiety and stress relief, or as something to fidget with to help with focus. Fidget putty can be helpful for people with ADHD and Autism, or as an exercise for sufferers of arthritis. Unicorn poo putty is bright pink and glittery in colour and is non-toxic. The tubs measure approx. 7cm x 7cm x 2cm. Pack of 2 tubs of unicorn poo putty per order. Please be advised: The slime can leave marks on soft furnishings, walls, and ceilings, and the slime is not suitable for children under 3. Adult supervision is recommended. This product is compliant with all applicable UK and EU safety requirements. Safety Warning WARNING! Choking hazard, Small parts. Staining Risk Adult supervision
